subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath manifested His Self and spoken forth a Word whereby all within the heavens and upon the earth were struck with awe, save a few [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر نفسه و نطق بکلمه انصعق منها من فی السموات و الارض الا عده
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @power of the Manifestation of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @presence of; reunion with God
